title: Run power-aware simulation across states
description: Simulate with the power-intent file active so isolation, retention, and power-up sequencing are exercised.
body: Use when verifying a design with multiple power states before tapeout. Do not rely on functional simulation alone, since it ignores isolation and retention behavior. Actions: load the power-intent file into the simulator, drive every power-down and wake transition, and verify state restores and isolation clamps correctly. Validation signals include correct retention restore after each cycle and no X propagation from gated domains. Risk boundary: an unexercised transition can hide a fatal corruption, so deny tapeout until every power-state transition is simulated.
